forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely later tonight. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later tonight. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Moderate

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely later tonight. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Hawker, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Moderate

Cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
No Rating

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

No Rating

Mostly sunny. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 26.
Moderate

Sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
